summary: Iteration 38: Tested navbar dynamic links (no hardcoded) and gallery drag-to-reorder. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.js: All 3 navbar variants (DefaultNavbar, ModernNavbar, ClassicNavbar) now use only headerPages from nav_pages API - no hardcoded baseLinks array
Navbar.js: headerPages filtered by show_in_header=true and sorted by order field
Navbar.js: Mobile menu also uses headerPages - no hardcoded links
GalleryManager.js: Full rewrite with @dnd-kit drag-to-reorder using SortableGalleryCard, DndContext, SortableContext, rectSortingStrategy
GalleryManager.js: Each gallery card has GripVertical drag handle that appears on hover in top-right corner
GalleryManager.js: After drag ends, new order saved automatically via PUT /api/admin/gallery/reorder/batch
admin_content.py: PUT /api/admin/gallery/reorder/batch endpoint accepts items array with id and order
admin_content.py: Admin gallery list now sorts by order field (line 198)
public.py: Public gallery now sorts by order field ascending (line 107)
api.js: reorderGallery method added for batch reorder API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 38 features verified: (1) Navbar dynamic links - all 3 navbar variants (Default, Modern, Classic) only render headerPages from API, no hardcoded baseLinks. News/Gallery/Reading List correctly NOT shown (show_in_header=false). (2) Gallery drag-to-reorder - GalleryManager uses @dnd-kit with SortableGalleryCard, drag handles visible on hover, reorder saves automatically via batch API. (3) Gallery order persistence - admin gallery list and public gallery both sort by order field. Categories dialog and photo edit dialog still work correctly.

navbar_no_hardcoded_links.details: Navbar.js has no baseLinks array or hardcoded /news, /gallery, /reading-list links

navbar_shows_only_header_pages.details: Desktop navbar shows: Home New, Our Group, Services, Knowledge Base (all have show_in_header=true)

navbar_excludes_hidden_pages.details: News, Gallery, Reading List NOT shown in navbar (all have show_in_header=false)

mobile_navbar_dynamic.details: Mobile hamburger menu shows same 4 pages as desktop - no hardcoded links

gallery_manager_drag_handles.details: 6 gallery cards each have GripVertical drag handle that appears on hover

gallery_manager_instruction_text.details: Shows 'Drag photos to reorder. Changes save automatically.' instruction

gallery_reorder_batch_api.details: PUT /api/admin/gallery/reorder/batch accepts items array and updates order field

gallery_reorder_persistence.details: After reorder, fetching gallery returns items in new order

admin_gallery_sorted_by_order.details: GET /api/admin/gallery returns items sorted by order field

public_gallery_sorted_by_order.details: GET /api/public/gallery returns items sorted by order field ascending

gallery_categories_dialog.details: Categories button opens dialog showing Business, Marketing, Solution with edit/delete buttons

gallery_photo_edit_dialog.details: Photo edit dialog shows Title, Summary, Image, Category dropdown, Link input, Save button

public_gallery_page.details: Gallery page shows category tabs (All, Business, Marketing, Solution) and 6 photos
